message.entry: Cannot instantiate new module because module at {0} is already on the path or registered. MATLAB is in an inconsistent state. Please remove this module from the path.
Cannot find a valid module at {0}. This module did not get properly instantiated previously.
Module definition file is missing or incorrect at location {0}.
No module at location {0} is currently registered.
No module named {0} is currently registered.
Cannot unregister module {0} because it is currently executing.
Cannot unregister module from a non-module root location.
Cannot register this module. Another module in {0} is using the same module name, provider and version of this module.
Cannot register module {0} because its subfolder {1} is currently on the path.
